nasb.text: or a hunchback or a dwarf, or one who has a defect in his eye or eczema or scabs or crushed testicles.

esv.text: or a hunchback or a dwarf or a man with a defect in his sight or an itching disease or scabs or crushed testicles.

cnv.text: 駝背、矮小、眼睛有毛病、長癬、生疹，或是腎子損壞的，都不可走近來，

ccb.text: 驼背的、矮小的、患眼疾的、长疥癣的或睪丸受损的，都不可近前来献祭。
